title: Calibration Procedure: Fixed, downward
description:
Calibration Procedure: Fixed, downward

Calibration Procedure: Fixed Downward

This calibration will allow you to search for objects from a fixed camera looking down into the robot work envelope and get their positions in the robot coordinate system.  In this section, the procedure to plate the calibration on the work plane will be described.  For details of the calibration procedure when using the target on the tool attached to the end effector as a reference point, refer to "7.6.3  Calibration Procedure: Fixed Downward (when performing correction of lens distortion and camera tilt)".

Preperation

Using the Calibration Wizard
